title: Simulation data for "Trinucleotide-encoded RNA aminoacylation"
author: Röder, Konstantin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Simulation data for "Trinucleotide-encoded RNA aminoacylation" by Meng Su, Christian Schmitt, Ziwei Liu, Samuel J. Roberts, Kim C. Liu, Konstantin Röder, Andres Jäschke, David J. Wales and John D. Sutherland 
 
Data set is published and curated by Dr Konstantin Röder and contains energy landscape databases and example structures. The contained README file gives the detail on the data and software for use.
steps_raw:
Simulation data for "Trinucleotide-encoded RNA aminoacylation" by Meng Su, Christian Schmitt, Ziwei Liu, Samuel J. Roberts, Kim C. Liu, Konstantin Röder, Andres Jäschke, David J. Wales and John D. Sutherland 
 
Data set is published and curated by Dr Konstantin Röder and contains energy landscape databases and example structures. The contained README file gives the detail on the data and software for use.
